results.title: Standardized Definition of Progression Independent of Relapse Activity (PIRA) in Relapsing-Remitting Multiple Sclerosis.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 40227706. 2025/06/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Patellar tendinopathy (PT) is a highly prevalent injury among 
jumping athletes. The long-term prognosis of athletes with PT following physical 
therapy is unknown.
PURPOSE: To assess self-perceived recovery rate and the 5-year change in pain 
levels, disability, and sports participation, and to explore the prognostic 
factors associated with self-perceived recovery.
STUDY DESIGN: Cohort study; Level of evidence, 3.
METHODS: Athletes with PT who
